task_completion.description: Navigate to the Deployment creation form in the Rancher UI
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'Create Deployment' or similar is visible in the Rancher web interface.
The Namespace dropdown or input field in the creation form displays 'default'.
The Name text input field in the creation form contains the text 'web-frontend'.
The Replicas number input field in the creation form shows the value '2'.
The Container Image text input field in the creation form contains the text 'nginx:latest'.
The Deployments list page is visible, showing 'web-frontend' in the 'default' namespace, ideally with an 'Active' status or showing 2/2 replicas.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rancher web UI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Rancher GUI, not a terminal window running kubectl commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Rancher application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Rancher web UI, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply paste the prompt text into an unrelated field
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values are entered into their specific, correct form fields (Name, Namespace, Image, Replicas), not dumped into a search bar or single text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected deployment name: 'web-frontend'. Expected namespace: 'default'. Expected container image: 'nginx:latest'. Expected replicas: 2.
